issue_summary: Don't decode and reencode characters in a potentially different charset in AbstractOrigin.CharSequenceOrigin.getReader(Charset)
javadoc_before:
/**
     * Gets a new Reader on the origin, buffered by default.
     *
     * @param charset the charset to use for decoding
     * @return a new Reader on the origin.
     * @throws IOException if an I/O error occurs opening the file.
     */
